findings.title: Dead/misleading tenantContext parameter in validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields
findings.evidence: validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields declared tenantContext but did not reference it; only matterContext was used.
findings.recommendation: Drop the unused parameter, wire it to tenant-scope validation, or document it as intentionally reserved.

findings.title: Validator silently ignores unknown or typo'd optional keys
findings.evidence: validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields gated checks behind if field in value, so a misspelled key could be skipped and still return true.
findings.recommendation: Reject keys outside HUMAN_APPROVAL_OPTIONAL_FIELDS plus required identity fields, or document strict unknown-key rejection as deferred.

findings.title: Untested edge: null matter_id combined with a non-null matterContext
findings.evidence: The tests covered null matter_id without context and concrete matter_id with context, but not matter_id null with non-null matterContext.
findings.recommendation: Add a test asserting intended semantics.

findings.title: High metadata-mirroring surface, but backed by real behavioral tests
findings.evidence: Optional field metadata is duplicated across contract JSON, model registry, fixture, and validator parity assertions.
findings.recommendation: No action required for closeout; be aware parity scaffolding inflates maintenance cost.

findings.title: S09 closeout evidence artifacts not yet present
findings.evidence: rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m05-s09 lacked packet, command-evidence, claude-review-result, adjudication, and construction-inspection.
findings.recommendation: Write all five evidence artifacts before promoting S09.

findings.title: Dead or misleading tenantContext parameter in validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields
findings.details: Claude found tenantContext was declared but unused in validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields.
findings.recommendation: Wire tenantContext to explicit tenant-scope validation or remove/document it.
findings.evidence: validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields now calls assertHumanApprovalTenantScope when tenantContext is supplied; model tests and RP00 validator cover matching and mismatched tenant context.

findings.title: Unknown optional keys were silently ignored
findings.details: Claude found typo keys could be skipped by the field-specific if-in checks.
findings.recommendation: Reject keys outside the optional field registry plus required identity fields.
findings.evidence: validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields now rejects unsupported keys; model tests and RP00 validator cover blocked_claim_ref as a typo case.

findings.title: Null matter_id with non-null Matter context edge was untested
findings.details: Claude found firm-level null matter_id with a provided Matter context was not pinned by a test.
findings.recommendation: Add a test asserting the intended fail-closed behavior.
findings.evidence: model.test.js and scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs now assert that matter_id:null with non-null Matter context fails closed.

findings.title: High metadata-mirroring surface backed by behavioral tests
findings.details: Claude noted maintenance overhead from duplicated metadata parity assertions, while also confirming real behavior coverage exists.
findings.evidence: S09 retains parity scaffolding because RP00 H00 gate intentionally requires model, contract, fixture, validator, and evidence agreement; runtime positive and negative tests remain the anti-theater coverage.

findings.title: S09 closeout evidence artifacts not yet present
findings.details: Claude noted S09 could not be promoted until the five closeout artifacts exist under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m05-s09.
findings.recommendation: Record packet, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection; then rerun Hermes/local validation.
findings.evidence: S09 packet, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection are recorded under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m05-s09; final validation rerun is recorded in command evidence.

P1.title: S09 closeout evidence artifacts not yet present

P3.title: Dead or misleading tenantContext parameter in validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields
